faq.question: Can I show all procedures and prices on the website?
faq.answer: Yes, a catalog of procedures with descriptions, duration, and prices is easily added to the website.

faq.question: How will clients book procedures?
faq.answer: Built-in booking form allows selecting procedure, specialist, and convenient time — request comes to you.

faq.question: Is the design suitable for an SPA salon?
faq.answer: Yes, there are elegant templates with soft colors, calm typography, and relaxation atmosphere.

faq.question: Will the SPA appear in search results?
faq.answer: Yes, websites are SEO-optimized — the SPA will appear in city and services search results.

faq.question: How much does it cost to create an SPA website?
faq.answer: You can create a website for free. Paid plans unlock custom domain and advanced features.

faq.question: Can I add interior photos and specialist work?
faq.answer: Yes, the gallery allows showing the SPA interior, equipment, and procedure examples.
